query:
SELECT 
  id,
  CONCAT(awayTeam, ' @ ', homeTeam) AS matchup,
  startTimeEst,
  publishedToFeed,
  publishedModel,
  modelAwayScore,
  modelHomeScore,
  modelAwaySpread,
  modelHomeSpread,
  modelTotal,
  modelAwayML,
  modelHomeML
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
